hooks.command: file=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$file" in *.ts|*.tsx) npx oxlint "$file" ;; esac
file=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$file" in *package-lock.json) echo 'Blocked: package-lock.json should only change via npm install, not direct edits.' >&2; exit 2 ;; esac
